reason: This tweet references Quranic verses (19:90-91) criticizing the Christian concept of God having a son, in relation to Christmas. While critical of Christianity, it uses theological argument rather than violent extremist rhetoric.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: 1- تكاد السماوات يتفطرن منه . 2- وتنشق الأرض . 3- وتخر الجبال هدا . لكن لماذا ؟ أن دعوا للرحمن ولدا ! #الكريسمس
